name: Asia Precision Public Company Limited
summary: Asia Precision Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells precision metal parts and components for automotive, air conditioning and refrigeration compressor, digital camera, and medical sectors in Thailand and internationally. It is also involved in the design, engineering, consultation, construction, maintenance, system testing, and sale of construction related equipment for various power plant projects, such as renewable power plants, power sub-stations, and raw water distributing facilities; storage and distribution of raw water; distribution of materials, tools, equipment, and spare parts for the construction of power plants; and other energy businesses. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Chonburi, Thailand.
